message:
fix: resolve mouse freeze on bead modal (#13) and cursor lag (#14)

Issue #13: Fix z-index collision between custom cursor (now z-[10000])
and bead detail modal (z-[9999]). Add useBodyScrollLock when modal is
open, keyboard Escape handler, and reduce backdrop-blur-2xl to
backdrop-blur-md on the overlay.

Issue #14: Remove expensive window.getComputedStyle() call from the
cursor's per-frame flush callback. Consolidate multiple closest() DOM
traversals into a single parent walk. Add will-change: transform to
the cursor container for compositor-layer promotion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
